blocks.title: Profile
blocks.text: 12 years in operations leadership across manufacturing and logistics in Southern Europe. Led the rollout of real-time plant monitoring across 24 sites, cutting average downtime by 38% in eighteen months. Managed a €14M operating budget and a 45-person team across three countries. Now targeting a COO-track role at an industrial-tech scale-up.

entries.label: 2022 — Present
entries.heading: Operations Director
points: Cut average plant downtime 38% across 24 sites in 18 months
Rebuilt the S&OP process, shortening the planning cycle from 6 weeks to 10 days
Managed a €14M operating budget and a 45-person cross-country team

entries.heading: Plant Operations Manager
points: Directed daily operations for a 300-person production plant
Introduced lean scheduling that lifted on-time delivery from 81% to 96%

entries.heading: Process Engineer
points: Redesigned two assembly lines, reducing changeover time by 45%
Trained 20 shift leads on statistical process control
